summary: Matchday KPI Navigation Bug Fix Testing - All tests PASSED. Feature: When clicking a matchday status KPI on dashboard (DRAFT/OPEN/LOCKED/LIVE/COMPLETED), the user is redirected to Matchdays page with 'Tutte le leghe' (All leagues) auto-selected and status filter pre-applied. Previously only national league matchdays were loaded.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/admin/matchdays?league_id=all: PASS - Returns 63 matchdays (all leagues: 6 DRAFT, 2 OPEN, 10 LOCKED, 0 LIVE, 45 COMPLETED)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/admin/matchdays (no league_id): PASS - Returns 24 matchdays (national league only: 0 DRAFT, 1 OPEN, 0 LOCKED, 0 LIVE, 23 COMPLETED)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/rbac/dashboard-stats: PASS - Dashboard KPIs show: DRAFT=6, OPEN=2, LOCKED=10, LIVE=0, COMPLETED=45

dashboard_kpi_navigation.LOCKED_KPI_click: PASS - Navigates to Matchdays with league='all' (Tutte le leghe) and status='LOCKED', shows 10 matchdays
dashboard_kpi_navigation.OPEN_KPI_click: PASS - Navigates to Matchdays with league='all' and status='OPEN', shows 2 matchdays
dashboard_kpi_navigation.DRAFT_KPI_click: PASS - Navigates to Matchdays with league='all' and status='DRAFT', shows 6 matchdays
dashboard_kpi_navigation.COMPLETED_KPI_click: PASS - Navigates to Matchdays with league='all' and status='COMPLETED', shows 45 matchdays

sidebar_navigation.direct_sidebar_click: PASS - Navigates to Matchdays with league='f1373417-43aa-4043-b6a2-125873181c95' (Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic), NOT 'all'

tutte_le_leghe_behavior.league_selector_option: PASS - 'Tutte le leghe' (value='all') is first option in dropdown
tutte_le_leghe_behavior.global_view_message: PASS - When 'Tutte le leghe' selected, shows 'Vista globale: seleziona una lega specifica per creare giornate' instead of create form
tutte_le_leghe_behavior.all_matchdays_displayed: PASS - With 'Tutte le leghe' and no status filter, shows all 63 matchdays

league_selector_functionality.change_to_specific_league: PASS - Changing to specific league loads only that league's matchdays
league_selector_functionality.create_form_visibility: PASS - Create form shown for specific leagues (national/custom), hidden for 'Tutte le leghe'

verified_features: Login to admin panel at /api/admin-ui with admin@fantapronostic.com / admin123
Dashboard shows matchday KPIs (Bozza=6, Open=2, Locked=10, Live=0, Completate=45) with correct counts
Click on LOCKED KPI → navigates to Matchdays with league='all' and status='LOCKED', showing 10 LOCKED matchdays
Click on OPEN KPI → navigates to Matchdays with league='all' and status='OPEN', showing 2 OPEN matchdays
Click on DRAFT (Bozza) KPI → navigates to Matchdays with league='all' and status='DRAFT', showing 6 DRAFT matchdays
Click on COMPLETED KPI → navigates to Matchdays with league='all' and status='COMPLETED', showing 45 COMPLETED matchdays
Direct sidebar navigation to Matchdays defaults to national league (NOT 'Tutte le leghe')
Changing league selector to specific league loads only that league's matchdays
When 'Tutte le leghe' is selected, create form shows 'Vista globale: seleziona una lega specifica per creare giornate' message
Backend API: GET /api/admin/matchdays?league_id=all returns all 63 matchdays across all leagues
Backend API: GET /api/admin/matchdays (no league_id) returns only 24 national league matchdays
critical_code_review_comments: Code correctly implements the fix: When statusFilter is set (from dashboard KPI click), league selector defaults to 'all'
The defaultAll variable at line 1411 (const defaultAll = !!statusFilter;) correctly determines when to select 'Tutte le leghe'
Backend API correctly handles league_id='all' by not adding league_id filter to query (line 3468-3472 in server.py)
data-testid attributes properly set: md-league-selector, md-status-filter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: Dashboard KPI navigation to Matchdays now correctly selects 'Tutte le leghe' (all leagues) option with status filter pre-applied. Key test-ids: md-league-selector, md-status-filter. The navigateWith() JavaScript function passes status filter which triggers defaultAll=true in render_matchdays(), causing league selector to default to 'all' value. Direct sidebar navigation still defaults to national league as expected.
